subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 784109140/251106337 is not a GRB
body:
U. Pathak (IITB) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 784109140/251106337 at 08:05:35.06 UT
on 06 November 2025, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
